title: Chatwoot node fails to send PDF attachments
symptom: The Chatwoot node does not successfully send a PDF file when using base64 encoded data.
not_this_if: Sending text messages or other supported operations
root_cause: The default Chatwoot node in n8n is designed for basic operations and does not support sending attachments directly from base64 encoded data. This limitation requires a more complex setup using the HTTP Request node to properly format the multipart/form-data request expected by the Chatwoot API.
fix_steps: Add a Move Binary Data node to convert the base64 PDF to binary.
Set the HTTP Request node to POST with the correct Chatwoot API URL and configure the body parameters for sending the attachment.
agent_instruction: Use the HTTP Request node to send the PDF attachment to Chatwoot after converting it from base64.
